events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce JSON answer. Need identify hazards from scenario: cords across walkways (trip/electrocution), missing guardrails (fall hazard), blocked egress/extinguishers (egress/fire hazard), improvised scaffolds (scaffold non-compliance 1926 Subpart L), unattended open holes (fall hazard). Work actively in progress. Decision fail due dangerous/non-compliant. Risk critical or high? Multiple immediate life safety hazards: open holes, missing guardrails, blocked egress/fire extinguishers, improvised scaffolds. likely critical. component_conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. percent_complete maybe 50? not clear, but active work; set 0? The schema says numeric estimate overall progress. Could set 50. value 0. confidence 0.95. event_time 0 rate 0 sound_source "". order empty, workable empty. findings list. actions list. references. Ensure valid JSON. Use raw no fences.

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "critical",
  "work_stage": "in-progress",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 50,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0.0,
  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Electrical cords routed across walkways create trip and shock hazards",
    "Missing guardrails expose workers to fall hazards at elevated edges",
    "Blocked egress paths and obstructed fire extinguishers impede emergency escape and fire response",
    "Improvised scaffolds lack required design, guardrails, access, and competent-person oversight",
    "Unattended open holes present unprotected fall-through hazards"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Relocate or cover cords with approved cord covers; secure overhead routing where feasible",
    "Install OSHA-compliant guardrails or equivalent fall protection at all open edges immediately",
    "Clear all egress routes and maintain 3-foot access to fire extinguishers",
    "Remove improvised scaffolds and provide engineered/planned scaffolding meeting 1926 Subpart L",
    "Cover or guard unattended floor holes with secured covers or guardrails; post an attendant until controlled"
  ],
  "rationale": "The observed site contains multiple concurrent life-safety hazards—falls, fire/egress impairment, electrocution/trip exposure, and non-compliant scaffolding—requiring immediate abatement before work can safely continue.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA General Duty Clause",
    "29 CFR 1926 Subpart L - Scaffolds",
    "29 CFR 1926.501 - Fall Protection",
    "29 CFR 1926.403 - Electrical",
    "29 CFR 1926.34 - Means of Egress",
    "29 CFR 1926.150 - Fire Protection"
  ]
}
